name: @cairn/core
description: cairn engine — collects GitHub / local Git / Notion activity and publishes daily / weekly / monthly worklogs.

scripts.build:bundle: ncc build src/main.ts -o dist/bundle -e pino-pretty -e pino-roll -e class-validator -e class-transformer -e @nestjs/microservices -e @nestjs/websockets -e @nestjs/platform-express -e @nestjs/platform-fastify -e @nestjs/platform-socket.io -e @nestjs/platform-ws -e cache-manager
